items.title: Clean up Arcade investment memo per Matthew's feedback
items.context: Email from matthew@fin.capital on Apr 15: 'Delete repetitive language in Investment Summary, complete the investment box criteria section (blank), add scorecard notes, pull actual memo if pursuing.'

items.title: Connect Sentra (Ashwin Gopinath) with Amex AI team
items.context: Email thread Apr 20-21: Ashwin said 'Love to get connected to the Amex Team.' Fan replied that his contact at Amex who leads AI investments is 'very interested in learning more.'

items.title: Review Sentra deck, strategy doc, and research folder before follow-up meeting
items.context: Ashwin shared deck (PDF), strategy/thesis doc, and research folder on Apr 17. Follow-up meeting scheduled today Apr 21 at 2:30 PM ET. Ashwin going into 3 ICs next week.

items.title: Follow up with Discern Security on deck and round progress
items.context: Outbound email from Derek on Apr 15: 'I'd love to check in on how the round is progressing and, if you have a deck or any other materials readily available, would be grateful if you could share them.' No response captured yet.

items.title: Review Engramme data room and assess round participation
items.context: Gabriel shared data room link on Apr 2. Fan followed up Apr 14 asking for round updates: 'We remain very excited about what you are building and stand ready to make introductions.' Round is moving fast per Gabriel.

items.title: Send follow-up notes after Apr 20 LotLine <> Fin Capital meeting
items.context: LotLine <> Fin Capital meeting took place Apr 20 with Sean Larson, Reid Roman, Jake, Matthew, Derek. Calendar acceptance received from reid@trylotline.com on Apr 20.

items.context: Calendar event 'Teams: OPTI <> Fin Capital' on Apr 21 at 2:30 PM ET with Barak Perelman (CEO), Evelyn, Logan, Richie, Derek. Follow-up from Richie's RSA meeting with Barak.

items.context: Email from chris@dbgorilla.com on Apr 17: 'It was great meeting you both today... We understand you'll be syncing internally.' Updated deck attached.
